title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Easyday

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Easyday
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
